scripts.render-build: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix game2/server && npm install --prefix game3 && npm install --prefix game4 && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix game2/client && npm install --prefix undercover/server && npm install --prefix undercover/client && npm run build
